content.text: DONE Built QkExplorer.svelte: a circular polar diagram where the whole plot area is the ARIA slider (drag or arrow keys, step 5, 0-360, focusable, 44px+ at all widths) rotating an amber "q" vector against four fixed periwinkle key vectors (k1-k4 at 20/70/110/160deg) labeled at their tips in cream mono text. Below it, a live degrees readout and four lilac score bars (bidirectional around a zero baseline) with mono numeric dot-product readouts that rise/fall with alignment, with the currently best-aligned key visibly bolder in both the diagram and its bar/readout. Reduced-motion media query included; all colors via CSS vars, no hex/em dashes.
